subcodes.first_line: ...My wish is that these children should receive a Baha’í education, so that they may progress both here and in the Kingdom
subcodes.first_line_orig: اين اطفال را تربيت بهائی خواهم تا در ملک و ملکوت ترقّی نمايند و سبب سرور دل و جان
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
full_text_parts: My wish is that these children should receive a Bahá’í education, so that they may progress both here and in the Kingdom, and rejoice thy heart. In a time to come, morals will degenerate to an extreme degree. It is essential that children be reared in the Bahá’í way, that they may find happiness both in this world and the next. If not, they shall be beset by sorrows and troubles, for human happiness is founded upon spiritual behavior.
